channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meilleures montres connectées 2026 : polyvalentes ou sportives, notre sélection
item.description: Vous voulez craquer sur une smartwatch ? Galaxy Watch, Pixel Watch, Apple Watch, Garmin ou encore Withings. Voici notre sélection des meilleures montres connectées testées par notre rédaction pour accompagner votre smartphone Android ou votre iPhone.

item.title: Box 5G à la maison : le comparatif des meilleurs forfaits chez Free, SFR, Orange et Bouygues Telecom
item.description: On peut avoir une mauvaise connexion fibre chez soi, et même pas du tout, mais un bon réseau mobile. C'est un des cas de figure où les box internet en 4G ou en 5G sont une bonne alternative. Voici notre comparatif des meilleures box internet en 5G.

item.title: Test de la Hator Quasar 3S Ultima 8K : une mini G Pro X Superlight 2 à prix cassé
item.description: Hator poursuit le développement de sa gamme de souris avec l’arrivée de la série Quasar 3 Ultima, dont nous testons aujourd’hui le modèle 3S, pensé pour la performance et l’esport.

item.title: The case for banning cookie banners
item.description: You almost certainly encounter cookie banners all the time. They're the kind of low-level annoyance that just seems to come with being a person on the internet: a pop-up asking you to agree to share some kind of information, with someone, for some purpose. You could find out more, but you don't. No one does. […]

item.title: Un « sociopathe » à la tête de ChatGPT ? Une vaste enquête dresse un portrait peu flatteur du patron d’OpenAI
item.description: Cent interviews, des mémos secrets et un mot qui revient sans cesse : « sociopathe ». Le patron de l'IA la plus populaire du monde prépare son entrée en Bourse.

item.title: Forget digital photo frames — Polaroid’s unique photo printer with a built-in frame is perfect for analog fans
item.description: Polaroid's Hi-Print 3x3 portable printer-cum-frame breathes analog life into your smartphone pics, producing and giving a home to display square prints

item.title: Marvel’s ‘X-Men’ Movie Has Found Some New Writers
item.description: Plus, a familiar face is confirmed for 'The Batman, Part II'.

item.title: Why a former AirPods engineer is now building heat pumps
item.description: Merino Energy has simplified the heat pump dramatically in a quest to make them cheaper and easier to install.

item.title: Motorola announces Moto Pad and next-gen Moto G Stylus
item.description: Motorola has announced its two latest devices: the budget-friendly Moto G Stylus smartphone and the Moto Pad. The latter is a tablet and a new addition to the Motorola lineup with an 11-inch 2.5K display, compared to the 6.7-inch screen on the Moto G Stylus. The Moto Pad offers a MediaTek D6300 5G processor and 5G connectivity. It also has quad speakers with Dolby technology, including Dolby Atmos capability on speakers or through headphones with using supporting platforms. The Moto Pad comes with a 7040mAh battery that can stream for 12 hours on one charge. The new Moto Pad is available in Pa...

item.title: Aqara Thermostat Hub W200 Review: Almost Better than My Ecobee
item.description: Aqara’s first smart thermostat is a stellar first effort, but has work to do to catch the best thermostats out there.

item.title: Pebblebee’s new Halo tracker doubles as a personal safety device
item.description: After expanding the functionality of its Clip location tracker last year with a panic alarm that sends messages and your location to trusted contacts, Pebblebee has announced a new tracker with even more personal safety features. The Halo is brighter and louder than the Clip and features an easier-to-trigger alert. Available starting today for $59.99 […]...

item.title: The AI gold rush is pulling private wealth into riskier, earlier bets
item.description: On a recent episode of Equity, we talked to Arena Private Wealth to explore a growing trend: family offices bypassing VCs to gain direct exposure to AI startups, turning them from passive investors into active participants.

item.title: Adobe launches Acrobat Spaces, a free AI-powered study tool for students
item.description: Adobe Acrobat Spaces is a free tool for students to use AI and create different kind of study material from documents

item.title: Waymo opens robotaxi service in Nashville, partners with Lyft
item.description: Waymo now operates commercial robotaxi services in 11 cities, with various methods to hail.

item.title: What is the release date for Scrubs season 10 episode 8 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Scrubs season 10's penultimate episode will be released later this week — here's when and where you can watch it.

item.title: Block introduces Managerbot, a proactive Square AI agent and the clearest proof point yet for Jack Dorsey’s AI bet
item.description: Block today announced Managerbot, a new AI agent embedded in the Square platform that proactively monitors a seller's business, identifies emerging problems, and proposes actionable solutions — without the seller ever having to ask a question. The product marks the most tangible manifestation of CEO Jack Dorsey's controversial bet that artificial intelligence can fundamentally reshape how his company operates, builds products, and serves the millions of small businesses that depend on Square to run day-to-day commerce.In an exclusive interview with VentureBeat, Willem Avé, Block's head of prod...

item.title: Moins de 400 € pour un smartphone premium Samsung, c’est l’offre du jour chez Fnac et Darty
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S24 FE Entreprise Edition est similaire au modèle classique, avec quelques fonctions logicielles supplémentaires. On le trouve aujourd'hui à 399 euros au lieu de 749 euros au lancement.

item.title: Fan discovers what appears to be assets for Rockstar's canceled PS3 game, Agent, within GTA 5's leaked source code, including an early look at the spy game's main character
item.description: A fan has discovered what appears to be the early model for the main character for Rockstar Games' canceled project, Agent, within the leaked source code for Grand Theft Auto 5.

item.title: Hermeus raises $350M to build autonomous hypersonic fighters
item.description: The defense aviation startup is coming off two successful flight demonstrations, and with the next one, it's aiming to go supersonic.

item.title: Windows 11 : Microsoft va intégrer un système de « flags » pour tester les fonctions expérimentales
item.description: Microsoft a confirmé l’arrivée prochaine d’un nouveau système pour activer ou désactiver à la demande les futures fonctionnalités en cours de test dans les builds Insider de Windows 11.

item.title: Amazon and US Postal Service reach deal on delivery cuts - postal deliveries cut by 20 percent as 'longstanding partnership' continues
item.description: USPS will retain around 80% of its Amazon parcels, however the ecommerce giant wants to use its own growing network.

item.title: Pizza Movie has been a surprise hit for Hulu — and it’s all thanks to this Stranger Things star
item.description: Stranger Things' Gaten Matarazzo makes Pizza Movie well worth your time, as he steals the show here.

item.title: $45/mo for phone and internet? Mint Mobile just changed the game with its new 'Unf*! your bills' plan
item.description: Mint Mobile's new 'Unf*! your bills' deal gets you home internet and an unlimited 5G phone plan for just $45/mo - pretty incredible value.

item.title: Over 50? You need to be doing these 3 PT-approved exercises that 'replicate activities of daily living' for lifelong muscle
item.description: Avoid atrophy and build strength for life with these 3 PT-approved exercises.

item.title: ChatControl 1.0 est mort, mais les géants de la technologie refusent d’obéir
item.description: La loi européenne appelée « ChatControl 1.0 » par ses détracteurs a expiré samedi 4 avril. Les géants du numérique s'en moquent et maintiennent le cap.

item.title: Blumhouse Wants You to Remember Brendan Fraser Isn’t in This ‘Mummy’
item.description: 'Lee Cronin's The Mummy' is out soon but don't get it it confused with the other 'Mummy.'

item.title: Spotify's Prompted Playlist feature now works for podcasts
item.description: Spotify's Prompted Playlist tool now works for podcasts, after launching the feature for music earlier this year. As the name suggests, this is an AI thing. It lets users use natural language, or prompts, to describe what they're looking for in a playlist and the algorithm does the rest. The platform says the tool is a good match for podcasts, as listeners can use it to discover a new favorite show or "dive deeper into a topic or piece of culture." Spotify adds that the algorithm generates playlists based on both the prompt and a person's listening history, along with "what's happening in the ...

item.title: Best Electric Bikes (2026): Commuting, Cargo Bikes, Mountain Biking
item.description: I tested the best electric bikes in every category, from commuters and mountain bikes to foldables and cruisers.

item.title: Spotify’s prompted playlist feature will now work for podcasts, too
item.description: Spotify will now allow users to input natural language prompts to create podcast playlist.

item.title: Struggle to find podcasts that land with you? Spotify's new prompt tool can build you a curated pod playlist on specific topics
item.description: Are you a pop head or a weird science enthusiast? Spotify now lets you create playlists of podcast episodes on your favorite topics.

item.title: Plus de 200 € de remise pour ce laptop Asus à la configuration solide (AMD Ryzen 7 AI, 17 heures d’autonomie…)
item.description: Pour faire oublier un écran décevant, Asus décide de retirer 230 euros au prix de son Vivobook 14, qui passe sous les 700 euros. Ainsi, le laptop devient tout de suite plus intéressant.

item.title: Artemis II astronaut snaps a 'stunning' photo of the Moon's surface using an iPhone 17 Pro Max — this is what you can get with 8x zoom (and an unparalleled view)
item.description: Amazing photos and videos continue to come back from the Orion spacecraft as it rounds the Moon and heads home.

item.title: NHTSA closes probe into Tesla's remote parking crashes
item.description: The National Highway and Traffic Safety Administration has closed its investigation into Tesla’s remote parking features, after it found that previously reported incidents led to minor issues and happened in low speed. NHTSA’s Office of Defects Investigations opened an evaluation into incidents involving the company’s Actual Smart Summon feature in January 2025. It’s a level 2 automated driving feature meant for parking lots or private property, allowing Tesla owners to control their cars from an app within short distances. Investigators said there were 159 incidents involving the feature over...

item.title: Thinking of upgrading to a PS5 Pro before GTA 6, and Marvel's Wolverine or adding a Portal to your setup? Now is the time as retailers are still offering 'old' prices
item.description: Turns out that the PS5 price hike hasn't filtered through yet as loads of retailers are still selling hardware at the 'old' prices.

item.title: L’arme anti-pénurie d’Intel ? Nous refourguer du vieux matériel
item.description: La pénurie de mémoire vive conduit Intel à maintenir en service actif ses anciennes puces Raptor Lake encore un bon moment. Lancées sous leur forme initiale en 2023, ces dernières gèrent en effet aussi bien la DDR4 que la (rarissime et dispendieuse) DDR5. Une caractéristique particulièrement utile par les temps qui courent...

item.title: ‘We might as well get Google Pixels’: Samsung Galaxy owners rebel against being forced to switch to Google Messages
item.description: Samsung Messages is shutting down, and Galaxy owners aren't happy with the proposed alternative.

item.title: Votre Galaxy S25 va bientôt recevoir les meilleures fonctionnalités des S26
item.description: Bonne nouvelle pour les utilisateurs de Galaxy S25, Samsung a officiellement confirmé l'arrivée de fonctionnalités jusque-là exclusives aux Galaxy S26.

item.title: Sony removes a selection of 'spam' games from its storefront as it continues its battle against shovelware
item.description: Sony has delisted even more alleged shovelwarePS4andPS5games from its storefronts.

item.title: Microsoft is 'working hard on migrating all of Windows to modern UX', and jazzing up Windows 11's design — but can it make good on all its recent promises?
item.description: A Microsoft exec is promising work on the design front to 'help Windows 11 feel more polished and coherent'.

item.title: The 5 Best Outdoor Pizza Ovens: Wood-Fired, Gas, Propane (2026)
item.description: Pizza is universal. And it is perfect. But you’re going to need a better oven. These are the best outdoor pizza ovens on the market.

item.title: Artemis II pulvérise le record d’Apollo 13 lors d’un survol lunaire historique
item.description: Les quatre astronautes de la mission Artemis II viennent d'écrire une nouvelle page de l'exploration spatiale. En survolant la face cachée de notre satellite naturel, l'équipage a pulvérisé le record historique de distance de la Terre et profité d'un spectacle céleste inédit. Cette aventure technologique hors normes a également offert un moment d'une rare intensité qui restera gravé dans les mémoires....

item.title: Google Photos peut faire vos retouches d’un clic avec Gemini
item.description: La firme de Mountain View déploie à l’ensemble de ses utilisateurs sur Android une fonction de retouche photos automatique s’appuyant sur Google Gemini.
